ab: Keriden ako kamo a talalotok anini^ a romi’ad.
ch: A:我今天要帶你們去山上。
en: I will take you to the mountains today.

ab: Sowal sa ci ina^, “Adihay ko likes i lotok.” saan.
ch: B:媽媽說山上有很多蚊子。
en: Mom says that there are lots of mosquitoes in the mountains.

ab: Keriden ako kamo a talaomah anini^ a romi’ad.
ch: A:我今天要帶你們去田裡。
en: I will take you to the fields.

ab: Mikawmah kita hay?
en: Are we going to loosen the soil?

ab: Tatalocowa^ kita anini^ a romi’ad?
en: Where are we going today?

ab: Keriden no singsi^ kita a tala’alo^.
en: Teacher will take us to the riverside.

ab: Tatalacowa^ kita anini^ a romi’ad?
en: Where are we going today?

ab: Keriden no singsi^ kita a talalotok.
en: Teacher will take us to the mountains today.

ab: Tatala’alo^ kita anini^ a romi’ad haw?
en: Are we going to the riverside today?

ab: Caay, keriden no singsi^ kita a talalotok.
ch: B:不是，老師要帶我們去山上。
en: No, our teacher is going to take us to the mountains.

ab: Tatalalotok kita anini^ hay?
en: Are we going to the mountains today?

ab: Caay, tatalaomah kita anini^ a romi’ad.
ch: B:不是，我們今天要去田裡。
en: No, we are going to the fields.

ab: Singsi^, o maan ko nengnengen ita i ’alo^?
ch: A:老師，我們到河邊要看什麼?
en: Teacher, what are we going to see at the riverside?

ab: Minengneng kita to facacido’.
en: We are going to see dragonflies.

ab: Singsi^, o maan ko nengnengen ita i lotok?
ch: A:老師，我們到山上要看什麼?
en: Teacher, what are we going to see in the mountains?

ab: Minengneng kita to ’adipangpang.
en: We are going to see butterflies.

ab: Mimaan kita a talaomah?
en: What are we going to do in the fields?

ab: Minengneng kita to ’ariray a talaomah, na’onen ko rakat, ira ko alonah ato kaketi^ yo!
ch: B:我們要到田裡看我們種的玉米，要小心有螞蟻、蜜蜂唷!
en: We are going to see the corn we grow in the fields, but you need to be aware of the ants and bees.

ab: Singsi^, tatala’alo^ kita a midangoy hay?
ch: A:老師我們要到河邊游泳嗎?
en: Teacher, are we going to swim in the river?

ab: Caay, minengneng kita to facacido’.
en: No, we are going to see dragonflies.

ab: Singsi^, mipaloma^ kita to sinafel i omah hay?
ch: A:老師我們要到田裡種菜嗎?
en: Teacher, are we going to grow some vegetables in the fields?

ab: Mikawmah kita to omah anini^.
en: We are going to loosen the soil today.

ab: Ira ko facacido’ a maefer i:raw.
en: There are dragonflies flying around.

ab: Ani:ni^ a paka’araw kako to so’elinay a facacido’.
ch: B:我今天才看到真正活著的蜻蜓。
en: Today is the first time I see real living dragonflies.

ab: Ira ko ’adipangpang a maefer i:raw.
en: Today is the first time I see real living dragonflies.

ab: Yay! Ey! Maolah kako to ’adipangpang, fangcal sa a nengnengen.
ch: B:耶! 哇!  我喜歡蝴蝶，很漂亮。
en: Yeh! Wow! I love butterflies. They are very beautiful.

ab: Ira ko ’adipangpang a maefer i:raw.
en: There are butterflies flying around.

ab: Caay ko ’adipangpang kora, o kaketi^.
en: Those are not butterflies. They are bees.

ab: Itini: han a minengneng, aka ka tayra i ra:ay yo!
ch: A:在這裡看一看，不要到太遠的地方唷!
en: Come here and take a look. Don’t go too far!

ab: Hay, caay ka tayra kami i ra:ay.
ch: B:好，我們不會去太遠的地方。
en: Got it, we won’t go anywhere too far.

ab: Aka ka fekac, na’o:n han, matolo’a!
ch: A:不要用跑的，慢慢走免得跌倒了!
en: Don’t run and walk slowly lest you fall down.

ab: Nga:lay sa kako a pakanengneng.
en: I want to see them right away.
